title: OAuth session lookup duplicated between auth_status and proxy_anthropic_messages
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
dry
## Location
src/proxy.rs:328-356, 1037-1063
## Violation
Two near-identical cookie-parsing chains exist in auth_status and proxy_anthropic_messages — both perform headers.get(COOKIE)/to_str/split semicolons/strip 'anthropic_session=' prefix/oauth_store.get_session. DRY violation; also naive parsing (no handling of escaped semicolons inside cookie values).
## Mandated refactor
Extract fn cookie_session(headers, store) -> Option<OAuthSession>. Use the cookie crate for correct parsing. Inline a single helper in both routes.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
